name: better-go-to-file
description: A custom Go To File popup with tunable scoring.

scripts.check: bun run rulesync:check && bun run fmt:check && bun run lint && bun test && bun run compile && bun run knip

commands.title: Better Go To File: Reindex Now
Better Go To File: Inspect Icons

betterGoToFile.gitignored.visibility.markdownDescription: Controls whether gitignored files appear in the picker. `auto` only reveals them for exact filename queries that include an extension such as `.env.local` or `button.tsx`.

betterGoToFile.workspaceIndex.fileGlob.markdownDescription: Glob used by the workspace index watcher and filesystem fallback scanner.

betterGoToFile.workspaceIndex.excludedDi.markdownDescription: Directory segment names excluded from the workspace file index.

betterGoToFile.workspaceIndex.maxFileCou.markdownDescription: Maximum number of indexed files across the workspace. Use `0` to disable the cap.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Recommended default. Prioritizes exact filename intent while keeping context boosts moderate.
Strongly prefers exact and prefix matches with lighter contextual reranking.
Pushes recently and explicitly opened files higher, especially while browsing.
Favors files near the active editor, package, and directory tree.
Handles abbreviated and rough queries more aggressively.
betterGoToFile.scoring.preset.markdownDescription: Selects one of the built-in scoring presets.

betterGoToFile.scoring.customPreset.markdownDescription: Optional JSON string layered on top of the selected scoring preset. Leave empty to use the preset as-is. Example: `{"visits":{"explicitOpenWeight":4}}`.
